ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the article */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the domain where the article is published */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topic of the article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Main content of the article */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the article was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the article (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the article */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who authored the article */,
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who edited the article */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the article */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the article is targeted for */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Total number of views for the article */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Total number of shares for the article */,
  "favorites" INTEGER /* Total number of favorites for the article */,
  "ratings" REAL /* Average rating for the article */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_editor_id FOREIGN KEY ("editor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the domain (e.g., wikinews) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the domain */,
  "language" TEXT /* Default language for the domain */,
  "region" TEXT /* Default region for the domain */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the domain (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic (e.g., disease, research, music) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "language" TEXT /* Default language for the topic */,
  "region" TEXT /* Default region for the topic */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the topic (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., editor, journalist, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the article */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, publish) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "articles_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., edit, publish, archive) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent used for the change */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the change */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date the change was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_history_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_history_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "multimedia" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each multimedia element */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the media belongs to */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., image, video) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the media file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the media file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the media file was uploaded */,
  "alt_text" TEXT /* Alternative text for the media for accessibility */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption for the media */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the media (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_multimedia_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperlinks" (
  "hyperlink_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperlink */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the hyperlink belongs to */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the hyperlink */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hyperlink */,
  "link_text" TEXT /* Text displayed for the hyperlink */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the hyperlink (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the hyperlink */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date the hyperlink was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperlink_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperlinks_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperlinks_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the comment is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the comment */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating value (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the rating (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the rating */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being viewed */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was viewed */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views on the specified date */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the view occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent used for the view */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_views_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being shared */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was shared */,
  "share_count" INTEGER /* Number of shares on the specified date */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the share occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent used for the share */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_shares_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being favorited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who favorited the article */,
  "favorite_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was favorited */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the favorite (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the favorite */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date the favorite was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_favorites_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_favorites_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
